zh: 如果我有翅膀，我就能飞翔。
en: If I had wings, I could fly.

zh: 如果她更努力学习，她就会通过考试。
en: If she studied harder, she would pass the exam.

zh: 如果我是你，我就不会那样做。
en: If I were you, I would not do that.

zh: 如果他有更多时间，他就会帮助我们。
en: If he had more time, he would help us.

zh: 如果天气好，我们就去野餐。
en: If the weather were nice, we would go on a picnic.

zh: 如果我住在海边，我每天都会去游泳。
en: If I lived by the sea, I would swim every day.

zh: 如果她会说中文，她就能和他们交流。
en: If she could speak Chinese, she would be able to communicate with them.

zh: 如果我有足够的钱，我就会买那辆车。
en: If I had enough money, I would buy that car.

zh: 如果他不那么懒，他就会成功。
en: If he were not so lazy, he would succeed.

zh: 如果我们早点出发，我们就不会迟到了。
en: If we left earlier, we would not be late.

zh: 如果那时我知道真相，我就不会那样做了。
en: If I had known the truth then, I would not have done that.

zh: 如果她昨天没有迟到，她就不会错过那班车。
en: If she had not been late yesterday, she would not have missed the bus.

zh: 如果他当时更小心，就不会发生事故了。
en: If he had been more careful, the accident would not have happened.

zh: 如果我们那时带了雨伞，就不会淋湿了。
en: If we had brought an umbrella, we would not have got wet.

zh: 如果她当时接受了那份工作，她现在会更成功。
en: If she had accepted that job, she would be more successful now.

zh: 如果他那时听了我的建议，就不会有这些麻烦了。
en: If he had taken my advice, he would not have had these troubles.

zh: 如果我当时努力学习，我现在就不需要补课了。
en: If I had studied hard then, I would not need extra lessons now.

zh: 如果他们当时没有放弃，他们现在就会成功了。
en: If they had not given up, they would have succeeded by now.

zh: 如果我当时买了那套房子，现在就赚大了。
en: If I had bought that house then, I would have made a fortune now.

zh: 如果她当时没有生病，她就会参加比赛了。
en: If she had not been ill, she would have taken part in the competition.

zh: 我希望我会唱歌。
en: I wish I could sing.

zh: 她希望她住在城市里。
en: She wishes she lived in the city.

zh: 他希望他没有说那些话。
en: He wishes he had not said those words.

zh: 我希望天气能好一点。
en: I wish the weather were better.

zh: 她希望她当时没有放弃。
en: She wishes she had not given up.

zh: 要不是你的帮助，我就失败了。
en: But for your help, I would have failed.

zh: 是时候你去睡觉了。
en: It is time you went to bed.

zh: 他建议我们早点出发。
en: He suggested that we leave early.

zh: 重要的是每个人都参加会议。
en: It is important that everyone attend the meeting.

zh: 医生建议他每天锻炼。
en: The doctor recommended that he exercise every day.

zh: 如果我是总统，我会改变很多事情。
en: If I were the president, I would change many things.

zh: 如果地球停止转动，会发生什么？
en: What would happen if the earth stopped rotating?

zh: 如果没有水，生命就不会存在。
en: If there were no water, life would not exist.

zh: 如果我能回到过去，我会更珍惜时间。
en: If I could go back to the past, I would cherish my time more.

zh: 如果人类能飞，世界将会大不相同。
en: If humans could fly, the world would be very different.

zh: 假设你赢了彩票，你会怎么做？
en: Suppose you won the lottery, what would you do?

zh: 要不是那场大雨，比赛就不会取消了。
en: But for the heavy rain, the game would not have been cancelled.

zh: 他宁愿你明天来。
en: He would rather you came tomorrow.

zh: 我宁愿她不知道这件事。
en: I would rather she did not know about this.

zh: 如果只是我能再见他一面就好了。
en: If only I could see him one more time.

zh: 要是我当时没有那么粗心就好了。
en: If only I had not been so careless.

zh: 她希望她能说流利的英语。
en: She wishes she could speak fluent English.

zh: 他们希望他们当时没有做那个决定。
en: They wish they had not made that decision.

zh: 委员会要求所有成员出席。
en: The committee demanded that all members be present.

zh: 她坚持要他道歉。
en: She insisted that he apologize.
